creator: oliver@akephalos.de
text:
Yes but this doesn't explain why it's okay in FreeBSD 7.2R? It wasn't okay 
in 7.1R. So I didn't expect anything new, but I'm really surprised to see 
it work in 7.2R. Sorry if I'm not of any further help, but if I cannot use 
my network in FreeBSD 8 current I can hardly use it at all.

Cheers Oliver
